given: the stock schema after the split migration has run
when: the stock record structure is inspected
then: the combined inventory_code column is no longer present, leaving batch_number and serial_number as the separately queryable fields

independence.rationale: Prior ACs assert the values held in the new columns and row preservation; this AC adds the distinct schema-shape outcome that the old combined column is retired, which can be broken (column still present) without affecting the parsed values or surviving rows.
